name: Paladin of White Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>白竜の聖騎士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナイト・オブ・ホワイトドラゴン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can Ritual Summon this card with "White Dragon Ritual". At the start of the Damage Step, if this card attacks a face-down Defense Position monster: Destroy that face-down monster. You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" from your hand or Deck, but "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" cannot attack for the rest of this turn.
mnst_eff: You can Ritual Summon this card with "White Dragon Ritual". At the start of the Damage Step, if this card attacks a face-down Defense Position monster: Destroy that face-down monster. You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" from your hand or Deck, but "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" cannot attack for the rest of this turn.
eff: You can Ritual Summon this card with "White Dragon Ritual". At the start of the Damage Step, if this card attacks a face-down Defense Position monster: Destroy that face-down monster. You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" from your hand or Deck, but "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" cannot attack for the rest of this turn.

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-down Defense Position Monster Cards
Destroys battling monster at the start of the Damage Step
